## Piano notes

The relative frequencies of subsequent piano notes is $2^{\frac{1}{12}}$.

```python
powers = (2**(p / 12) for p in range(-12 * 2, 12 * 2 + 1))
fractions = set(i / j for i in range(1, 5) for j in reversed(range(1, 5)))
all_sorted = sorted([(p, 'p') for p in powers] + [(f,) for f in fractions])
for x in all_sorted:
	print(x)
```
